text.title: STAR Interview Method Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 4-step procedure to apply STAR Interview Method. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: open-round
step.action: Set the frame: STAR expectation, time budget, note-taking pattern.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: probe-completeness
step.action: For each story, probe missing S/T/A/R; reject pronoun ambiguity ('we did X' → 'what did YOU do?').
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: anchor-notes
step.action: Write notes against the calibrated rubric anchor, not free prose.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: close-round
step.action: Submit scorecard within 24h with hire/no-hire + reasons.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
